allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps devops-and-continuous-integration optimize the whole service instead of treating build, release, and operate steps as disconnected work.
Debugging-strategies gives devops-and-continuous-integration the root-cause discipline needed when faster flow exposes brittle failures and hidden integration faults.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias causes devops-and-continuous-integration teams to protect a preferred pipeline model instead of actively testing alternatives against reliability reality.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Devops-and-continuous-integration conflicts with margin-of-safety when release cadence pressure compresses rollback buffers.
structured_tensions.source_quote: devops-and-continuous-integration vs margin-of-safety: devops-and-continuous-integration conflicts with margin-of-safety when release cadence pressure compresses rollback buffers.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Devops-and-continuous-integration conflicts with optimization-theory when pipeline-local speed targets degrade end-to-end reliability.
structured_tensions.source_quote: devops-and-continuous-integration vs optimization-theory: devops-and-continuous-integration conflicts with optimization-theory when pipeline-local speed targets degrade end-to-end reliability.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Devops-and-continuous-integration conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams seek evidence that confirms the chosen pipeline model or hypothesis rather than actively testing alternatives.
structured_tensions.source_quote: devops-and-continuous-integration vs confirmation-bias: devops-and-continuous-integration conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams seek evidence that confirms the chosen pipeline model or hypothesis rather than actively testing alternatives.

curation_notes.summary: The relation surface stays on the raw source's cleanest first-order graph: systems and diagnosis as allies, plus the explicit pressure block on safety, speed, and belief protection.
donor_drops: Did not widen into broader engineering-culture relations because the current source-backed tension block is already strong and inspectable.
open_questions: Game-theory and design-thinking are source-real allies, but systems-thinking and debugging-strategies were the stronger operational anchors.
